Introduction

Midia Metal Ltd ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal data when you visit our website, place an order, or interact with our services. We are a data controller for the purposes of the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018.

Our registered address is in the United Kingdom. For any data protection queries, please contact us at info@midiaematal.com.

Information We Collect

Information You Provide

  • Account and order information: name, business name, delivery address, email address, telephone number, and billing details when you create an account or place an order.
  • Payment information: card details and billing address. We do not store full card numbers on our servers; payment processing is handled securely by Stripe, a PCI-DSS compliant payment service provider.
  • Communication records: if you contact us by email, phone, or through our website contact form, we retain records of those communications.
  • Trade account details: for trade and B2B customers, we may collect company registration number, VAT number, and trade references.

Information We Collect Automatically

  • Technical data: IP address, browser type and version, operating system, device information, and time zone settings.
  • Usage data: pages visited, time spent on pages, navigation paths, and referring URLs.
  • Cookie data: see our Cookies Policy for full details.

How We Use Your Information

We process your personal data on the following legal bases under UK GDPR:

  • Contractual necessity: to process and fulfil your orders, arrange delivery via our shipping partner EasyPost, manage your account, and provide customer support.
  • Legitimate interests: to improve our website, products, and services; to prevent fraud; and to send marketing communications where you have not opted out (B2B customers).
  • Legal obligation: to comply with tax, accounting, and consumer protection laws, including retaining VAT invoices for the period required by HMRC.
  • Consent: where you have explicitly consented, such as subscribing to our marketing newsletter.

Sharing Your Information

We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with the following categories of recipients:

  • Stripe: our payment processor, to securely process transactions. Stripe's privacy policy is available at stripe.com/gb/privacy.
  • EasyPost: our shipping and logistics partner, to arrange delivery of your orders. Address and contact details are shared solely for delivery purposes.
  • Professional advisers: including lawyers, auditors, and insurers who provide consultancy services to our business.
  • Regulatory authorities: where we are required by law, including HM Revenue & Customs.

Data Retention

We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary:

  • Order records: retained for a minimum of 6 years to comply with UK tax and accounting legislation.
  • Account information: retained while your account is active and for 2 years after your last interaction, unless you request deletion.
  • Marketing consent records: retained until consent is withdrawn.
  • Website analytics data: retained in anonymised form for up to 26 months.

Your Rights

Under the UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018, you have the following rights:

  • Right of access: request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
  • Right to rectification: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Right to erasure: request deletion of your personal data where there is no lawful basis for continued processing.
  • Right to restrict processing: request that we limit the way we use your data.
  • Right to data portability: receive your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.
  • Right to object: object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes.
  • Right to withdraw consent: withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@midiaematal.com. We will respond within one calendar month. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO).

Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Our website uses SSL/TLS encryption, and all payment transactions are processed through Stripe's secure, PCI-compliant infrastructure.

International Transfers

Your data is primarily processed within the United Kingdom. Where any third-party service provider processes data outside the UK, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as the UK International Data Transfer Agreement or adequacy regulations approved by the Secretary of State.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

Last updated: April 2026

Introduction

These Terms & Conditions govern the sale of goods by Midia Metal Ltd ("we", "our", or "us") to customers ("you", "your") through our website. By placing an order with us, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our website or place an order.

These terms apply to all orders for commercial kitchen equipment, canopy hoods, ventilation fans, grease filters, wall cladding, extraction systems, and related parts and accessories.

Orders and Contract Formation

Placing an Order

When you place an order through our website, you are making an offer to purchase the goods at the price displayed. We will acknowledge receipt of your order by email, but this does not constitute acceptance. A binding contract is formed only when we dispatch the goods or send you an order confirmation email, whichever occurs first.

Order Cancellation by Us

We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order at our discretion, including where goods are out of stock, pricing errors have occurred, or we are unable to verify payment. If we cancel your order after payment has been taken, we will issue a full refund without delay.

Pricing and Payment

Prices

All prices are displayed in Pounds Sterling (GBP). Prices shown on product pages may be exclusive or inclusive of VAT, as clearly indicated. The final price including VAT (where applicable) will be shown in your order summary before checkout.

We reserve the right to change prices at any time without prior notice. However, the price charged will be the price displayed at the time you placed your order.

VAT

Where VAT is applicable, it will be charged at the prevailing UK rate. Trade customers with a valid VAT registration number may be eligible for VAT-exempt purchases under the reverse charge mechanism where applicable. A VAT invoice will be provided with every order.

Payment

Payment is processed securely through Stripe. We accept major debit and credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and American Express. Payment must be received in full before goods are dispatched, unless alternative credit terms have been agreed in writing for trade accounts.

Delivery

Delivery Times

We aim to dispatch in-stock items within 3-5 working days of receiving cleared payment. Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed. Made-to-order items, including custom-sized canopy hoods and bespoke ventilation components, may require 2-6 weeks for manufacture and delivery. Specific lead times will be confirmed at the time of order.

Delivery Charges

Delivery charges are calculated at checkout based on the size, weight, and destination of your order, using our shipping partner EasyPost. Free delivery may be available on orders above a specified threshold, as advertised on our website.

Risk and Title

Goods are delivered at the buyer's risk from the time of dispatch. Title (ownership) of the goods passes to you only upon receipt of full payment.

Delivery Issues

Please inspect all goods upon delivery. If any items are damaged, missing, or incorrect, notify us within 48 hours of delivery with photographic evidence. We will arrange replacement or refund as appropriate.

Product Information

We make every effort to ensure that product descriptions, specifications, dimensions, and images on our website are accurate. However, minor variations may occur, particularly with made-to-order items. Product specifications are subject to change without notice. If a material change affects your order, we will contact you before dispatch.

Warranties

All goods supplied by Midia Metal Ltd are warranted to be free from material defects in workmanship and materials for a period of 12 months from the date of delivery, unless otherwise stated in the product description. This warranty does not cover:

  • Normal wear and tear
  • Damage caused by improper installation, misuse, or neglect
  • Damage caused by failure to follow manufacturer's instructions
  • Consumable parts such as filters and seals
  • Goods that have been modified or repaired by unauthorised persons

This warranty is in addition to your statutory rights, including those under the Consumer Rights Act 2015 (for consumer customers) and the Sale of Goods Act 1979.

Limitation of Liability

Nothing in these terms excludes or limits our liability for:

  • Death or personal injury caused by our negligence
  • Fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation
  • Any liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law

Subject to the above, our total liability to you for any claim arising out of or in connection with these terms or the goods supplied shall not exceed the purchase price of the goods in question. We shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential, or special losses, including loss of profit, loss of business, or business interruption.

Force Majeure

We shall not be liable for any delay or failure to perform our obligations where such delay or failure is caused by events beyond our reasonable control, including but not limited to acts of God, fire, flood, pandemic, government action, strikes, or supply chain disruptions.

Governing Law and Jurisdiction

These Terms & Conditions and any dispute or claim arising out of or in connection with them shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the law of England and Wales. The courts of England and Wales shall have exclusive jurisdiction to settle any dispute arising out of or in connection with these terms.

Contact

If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at info@midiaematal.com.

Last updated: April 2026

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit our website. They help the website remember your preferences, understand how you use the site, and enable certain features to function properly. Cookies are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to website owners.

How We Use Cookies

Midia Metal Ltd uses cookies for the following purposes:

  • To ensure the website functions correctly and securely
  • To remember your preferences and settings
  • To analyse how visitors use our website so we can improve our services
  • To process payments securely through our payment provider

Types of Cookies We Use

Essential (Strictly Necessary) Cookies

These cookies are required for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are typically set in response to actions you take, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms. They do not store any personally identifiable information.

Cookie NamePurposeDuration
XSRF-TOKENCross-site request forgery protectionSession
midia-metal-sessionMaintains your session while browsing2 hours
midia-metal-admin-sessionAdmin authentication session48 hours
cookie_consentRemembers your cookie preferences12 months

Analytics Cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous, aggregated information. This data helps us improve the user experience and identify which pages are most popular.

Cookie NamePurposeDuration
_gaGoogle Analytics — distinguishes unique users2 years
_ga_*Google Analytics — maintains session state2 years

Third-Party Cookies

Some cookies are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control these cookies and recommend reviewing the respective privacy policies of these providers.

ProviderPurposePolicy
StripePayment processing and fraud preventionStripe Privacy Policy
EasyPostShipping label generation and trackingEasyPost Privacy Policy

Managing Your Cookie Preferences

When you first visit our website, you will be presented with a cookie consent banner where you can accept or decline non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in the footer of our website.

Browser Controls

Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can typically find these settings in the "Options" or "Preferences" menu of your browser. Please note that blocking or deleting essential cookies may prevent parts of our website from functioning correctly.

For guidance on managing cookies in your browser, visit:

  • Google Chrome
  • Mozilla Firefox
  • Apple Safari
  • Microsoft Edge

Consent

By continuing to use our website, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy. Essential cookies are set automatically as they are necessary for the website to function. Non-essential cookies (analytics and marketing) are only set after you have given your explicit consent.

Updates to This Policy

We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our data practices. The updated version will be indicated by an updated "Last revised" date.

Last updated: April 2026

Our Returns Policy

At Midia Metal Ltd, we want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. This Returns & Refunds Policy outlines your rights and our procedures for returning goods. It applies to all orders placed through our website.

Cancellation and Cooling-Off Period

Under the Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013, if you are a consumer (not a business customer), you have the right to cancel your order within 14 calendar days of receiving the goods, without giving any reason. The cancellation period expires 14 days after the day on which you (or a nominated third party) take physical possession of the goods.

To exercise your right to cancel, you must inform us of your decision by contacting us at info@midiaematal.com or by writing to us. You may also use the cancellation form provided below, though this is not mandatory.

Conditions for Returns

Standard (In-Stock) Items

To be eligible for a return, items must meet the following conditions:

  • The goods must be unused, in their original condition, and in the original packaging
  • All protective films, labels, and accessories must be intact
  • Stainless steel canopy hoods must not have been mounted, drilled, or modified in any way
  • Grease filters, ventilation fans, and electrical components must be in unopened, sealed packaging
  • You must provide proof of purchase (order number or invoice)

Made-to-Order and Custom Items

Please note that made-to-order items, including custom-sized canopy hoods, bespoke wall cladding panels, and any products manufactured to your specific dimensions or requirements, are exempt from the right of cancellation under Regulation 28(1)(b) of the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, as they are made to the consumer's specifications or are clearly personalised. These items cannot be returned unless they are faulty or damaged.

Non-Returnable Items

The following items cannot be returned for hygiene or safety reasons unless they are faulty:

  • Opened grease filters and mesh panels
  • Electrical components that have been installed or wired
  • Items that have been cut, drilled, or modified after delivery
  • Special-order items sourced specifically for your requirements

How to Return an Item

  1. Contact us: Email info@midiaematal.com with your order number, the items you wish to return, and the reason for return.
  2. Receive authorisation: We will review your return request and, if approved, provide a Returns Authorisation (RA) number and return instructions.
  3. Pack the goods: Securely pack the items in their original packaging, including all accessories and documentation. Clearly mark the RA number on the outside of the parcel.
  4. Arrange return shipping: Unless the return is due to our error (damaged, faulty, or incorrect item), the cost of return shipping is the customer's responsibility. We recommend using a tracked and insured courier service, as we cannot be held responsible for goods lost or damaged in transit during the return.
  5. Send to our returns address: We will provide the returns address when issuing your RA number.

Refunds

Refund Timeline

Once we receive and inspect the returned goods, we will process your refund within 14 calendar days. Refunds will be issued to the original payment method used for the order.

Refund Amount

  • Standard returns (consumer, within cooling-off period): Full refund of the goods price, including standard delivery charges. We may deduct from the refund if the value of the goods has diminished due to handling beyond what is necessary to establish the nature, characteristics, and functioning of the goods.
  • Faulty or damaged goods: Full refund including all delivery charges. We will also cover the cost of return shipping.
  • Incorrect items supplied: Full refund or replacement at no additional cost, including return shipping.
  • B2B/trade returns: subject to the terms agreed at the time of order. Please refer to your trade account terms or contact us for details.

Damaged or Faulty Goods

If your goods arrive damaged or are found to be faulty, please notify us within 48 hours of delivery with clear photographic evidence. We will arrange for a replacement to be dispatched or issue a full refund, including any delivery charges. For faulty goods discovered after installation, please contact us within the warranty period (typically 12 months from delivery) and we will assess the claim under our warranty policy.

Exchanges

If you need a different size or model, please return the original item following the process above and place a new order. For made-to-order items, exchanges are not available as each item is manufactured to specific requirements.

Cancellation Form (Optional)

If you wish to cancel your order, you may complete and return the following form:

To: Midia Metal Ltd
Email: info@midiaematal.com

I hereby give notice that I cancel my contract of sale for the following goods:

  • Order number: _______________
  • Date of order: _______________
  • Name of consumer: _______________
  • Address of consumer: _______________
  • Signature (if sent by post): _______________
  • Date: _______________

Contact

If you have any questions about our Returns & Refunds Policy, please contact us at info@midiaematal.com.

Last updated: April 2026
